hooks.command: RUN_ID=$(gh run list --repo apelullo/paprika-agent --limit 1 --json databaseId --jq '.[0].databaseId'); WAITED=0; while [ "$(gh run view $RUN_ID --repo apelullo/paprika-agent --json status --jq '.status')" != "completed" ] && [ $WAITED -lt 120 ]; do sleep 5; WAITED=$((WAITED + 5)); done; gh run view $RUN_ID --repo apelullo/paprika-agent | python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.dumps({"additionalContext": sys.stdin.read()}))'
